reviews.review_msg: nice guy, never taking another course with him though. lab assignments were worth 50% of your grade and the marking was completely arbitrary

Bryn is very nice and you can tell he loves this subject. However, his grading is very tough and nonsensical, lost points for making the reports look more professional, and from adding details that I add to reports at my actual CRM job. The labs are very fun but seem to be thrown together last minute and him and the TA are often scrambling.
seems like a nice guy,. lab assignment instructions weren't very clear (Quizzes were easy). it's his first class so hopefully he learns.

labs poorly organized and not thought through, often felt last minute and like he had no idea what was going on, not open to feedback and rude when students asked about grades. It is his first class taught at this university, so maybe he'll mellow out in the next little bit, but I would not take another course with him.

Whatever you do, don't take his course; if you don't attend the lectures, he'll think you're skipping class every time, and he'll assume you're attending the lab sessions rather than participating in his lectures.
